post_breakdown.brief_description: Reviewing 3-day program on AI-powered agro-met advisories at scale under Mission Mausam.

posts: Collaborative AI Implementation: Hosted multi-agency review for AI-powered agro-met advisories.
Program Scaling: Facilitated standardization and planning for AI-enabled decision structures in agriculture.
Strategic Partnerships: Coordinated across multiple research and meteorological institutes for Mission Mausam.
